# quismon_check (Data Source)

Fetches a Quismon check by name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Check name.

### Read-Only

- `health_status` (String) Health status.
- `id` (String) Check ID.
- `type` (String) Check type.
